TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Juan_Manuel_Santos, title = Juan_Manuel_Santos, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Santos} }

S.FORM: I 1951 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Manuel Santos , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Columbia anini i ci Juan Manuel Santos, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~u~uan mano~u~u…ô…ĺ santo~us , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~u…ĺo~u~umb~b~via anini i ¶i *o~u~uan mano~u~u…ô…ĺ santo~us, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1951 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Manuel Santos , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Columbia anini i ci Juan Manuel Santos, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
